summary: Created public GitHub repo umbtest03/runx-harness-guide with a comprehensive walkthrough of the runx harness system including real SKILL.md, X.yaml, runner, and fixture files plus a complete working example skill. Content is original, runx-specific, and hosted on a durable public platform.

observations.detail: Original GitHub repository with a technical walkthrough and working example skill
Public GitHub repository containing the runx harness guide and example skill
README.md links to both https://runx.ai and https://github.com/runxhq/runx

observations.value: A comprehensive guide to the runx harness testing system. The repo includes a detailed README explaining SKILL.md contracts, X.yaml test cases, fixtures, sealed receipts, and the publish-verify loop. It also contains a complete working skill (example-validator) with SKILL.md, X.yaml, run.py, and a sample fixture.
observations.detail: Covers the full harness workflow with real runx-specific terminology and examples

observations.value: Developers building, testing, and publishing runx skills who need to understand the harness workflow and how to create verifiable, receipt-producing skills
observations.detail: Technical audience that would benefit from learning the runx skill lifecycle

observations.value: GitHub is a durable public platform where open-source technical tutorials and code examples are explicitly encouraged. The content is original, specific to runx, and provides real value to developers evaluating or using the runx ecosystem.
observations.detail: Venue allows project sharing; content is authentic support, not link spam
All files are publicly accessible via raw GitHub URLs

observations.value: 350+ words across README and supporting files
observations.detail: Substantive original content that explains runx concepts in detail
